description: Lists of Judeo-Arabic account entries related to financial arrangments in which figures are expressed alphanumerically. The dating may be provided on the fragment's verso where the month Tamuz is mentioned and possibly the year [5]225/ה]רכה] or roughly 1464/1465CE (these chronological markers may be parts of different heading). One of the entries is in the first-person, where the author titles a heading on the far left of the recto "ענדי סנאדיק", the latter word is the plural form of the financial term "סנדוק" which are listed individually within the same section of the fragment. The verso contains highly repetitive entries which may constitute pen trials of alphanumerical figures. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-15. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
